archetype: Archetype 5: Jewel & Luxury mixed with Archetype 4: Swiss Precision (Institutional High-End)
positioning: A Global Council Where Emerging Nations Shape the Future Together.

usage_rules.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white
usage_rules.h2: font-serif text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white
usage_rules.h3: font-sans text-xl md:text-2xl font-medium tracking-wide text-slate-200
usage_rules.overline: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-emerald-400 font-semibold

typography.instructions: Never use Inter or Roboto. Emphasize Playfair Display for authoritative, UN-style gravitas, paired with Manrope for Apple/Tesla-like minimalist readability.

surfaces.accent_card: bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-900/20 to-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-blue-500/30

animations.global_rules: Smooth scrolling with Lenis is mandatory. Staggered fade-up entrances for content.
animations.hover_states: Micro-interactions on hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border illumination (border-white/30 or border-blue-500/50).
animations.hero_globe: Three.js (or react-globe.gl) rotating globe. Dark base, electric blue water/landmasses, emerald green connection arcs between emerging nations. White glowing particles.
animations.counters: Animated number counters in Framer Motion (use viewport triggers).
animations.parallax: Dark cinematic parallax scroll for the 'Why ICEN Exists' section. Text moves at different speed than background.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-500 text-white font-sans font-medium px-8 py-3.5 rounded-sm transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,87,255,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(0,87,255,0.6)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 font-sans font-medium px-8 py-3.5 rounded-sm transition-all backdrop-blur-md

cards.membership: Glassmorphism base. The 'Most Popular' tier must use the accent_card surface with an electric blue glowing border.
cards.pillar: Square bento items, bg-slate-900/50 border border-white/5. On hover, expand/reveal SDG-style description.
cards.program: Tall rectangular cards (portrait). Image heavy, dark gradient overlay at bottom for text readability.

components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphic header (bg-slate-950/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10). UN-style SVG logo on left, desktop nav links centered, 'Apply' CTA button right.

logos.description: ICEN Emblem / Logo - Minimalist abstract global council emblem logo design, white lines on black

heroes.description: Abstract dark background texture, deep navy with subtle glowing electric blue geometric lines. Place BEHIND the 3D globe.

content.description: Cinematic wide shot of a modern city in an emerging nation at dusk. Use for 'Why ICEN Exists' parallax section.
High-end professional photography of diverse global leaders at an ultra-modern summit. Use for Programs/Summit cards.
Modern illuminated building at night. Use for Governance or Chapters section.

sections: Hero: Deep navy background, 3D rotating globe (Three.js), Electric Blue & Green arcs, 'ICEN' typography overlay. CTAs: Apply, Explore.
Stats: Grid of 4, minimalist, large serif animated counters (50+, 12, 8, 10K+).
Pillars Grid: 12-item bento grid of interactive SDG-style icons.
Story Parallax: 'Why ICEN Exists'. Dark cinematic scrolling over the parallax_cinematic_city image. Huge serif text.
Global Structure: Interactive world map UI (can use SVG or canvas).
Final CTA: Deep navy, centered text: 'The World Does Not Wait. Neither Should You.' Blue primary button.

page_layouts.About_ICEN: Detailed history, mission, and vision. Text-heavy but structured beautifully with large serif pull-quotes. Parallax imagery.
page_layouts.Pillars: Deep dive into the 12 pillars. Use a stacked layout with alternating left/right text-to-image alignments.
page_layouts.Membership: Pricing/Tier style page but institutional. 3 Glass cards. Feature comparison table with extreme precision (border-white/10).
page_layouts.Chapters_Regions: Map-heavy or list-heavy bento grid of 8 regions.
page_layouts.Councils_Governance: Contains the Governance flow-diagram. Use react-flow-renderer or custom SVG paths linking nodes. Node styles: Glassmorphism.
page_layouts.Programs: Grid of large portrait cards (Summit, Accelerator, Policy Lab).
page_layouts.Apply: Multi-step form wizard. Highly styled Shadcn UI inputs, dark mode, green success states.
page_layouts.Admin_Login: Minimalist centered card on dark background. Glassmorphism.
page_layouts.Admin_Dashboard: Sidebar nav. Data table of applications. Use Tailwind neutral gray/slate (Archetype 4 style) but keep it strictly dark mode. High data density.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: framer-motion, lucide-react, three, @react-three/fiber, @react-three/drei, react-globe.gl, @studio-freight/react-lenis
DO NOT use Inter or Roboto. Setup Playfair Display (headings) and Manrope (body) via Google Fonts.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing layouts, relying on Shadcn ONLY for interactive logic (Forms, Dialogs, Tables).
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
The UI MUST feel authoritative, dark, and extremely precise—no rounded bubbly shapes. Stick to rounded-sm or rounded-none to emulate high-end architectural/institutional design.
